hook: URA just reshuffled the map — here's what shifts in your favour

slides.sub: New zoning, density uplift and policy moves — what they mean for buyers, sellers and holders right now.

slides.lead: URA's latest masterplan cycle has flagged fresh zoning and land-use shifts.

headline_parts.text: are the two levers that quietly

slides.pre: Historical price uplift at rezoning zones
slides.post: Estimated uplift range seen in prior masterplan cycles where residential density was increased. Qualify at site level.
slides.source: URA historical caveats · POV Guy analysis

slides.title: Three masterplan levers that move prices

items.body: Gross plot ratio (GPR) uplift lets developers build denser — that floor increase flows into land bids and EN values.
White sites and mixed-use rezoning inject demand floors: commercial activity within walking distance lifts residential psf.
Transport node proximity bonus: MRT or BRT designations in the draft plan typically re-anchor a corridor's price ceiling.

slides.source: URA planning parameters · POV Guy analysis

slides.title: Land-use changes to track in 2026

items.label: Greater Southern Waterfront
items.sub: Massive mixed-use uplift, 2,000 ha long-run pipeline

items.label: Jurong Lake District
items.sub: 2nd CBD anchor, GPR uplift across sub-zones

items.label: Woodlands Regional Ctr
items.sub: Northern CBD push, MRT interchange density play

items.label: Tengah / Jurong West
items.sub: Car-free town spine, new HDB + private mix incoming

slides.source: URA Concept Plan · Long-term planning review

slides.label: The edge buyers miss
slides.punch: Most buyers wait for the news cycle. The window is the 12–18 months between a masterplan signal and the first en-bloc or GLS award in that zone.
slides.punch_bold: By the time it's obvious, the uplift is already priced in.

slides.title: Current policy headwinds to price in

items.body: ABSD at 60% for foreigners and 20% for second-property citizens remains a structural ceiling on speculative demand.
Total Debt Servicing Ratio (TDSR) cap at 55% — rising SORA still compresses quantum for leveraged buyers upgrading.
GLS supply: H1 2026 confirmed sites add ~5,050 private units to pipeline, keeping new-launch psf anchored competitively.

quote_parts.text: Follow the infrastructure, not the headline.

caption:
URA's masterplan is the most underused tool in a Singapore buyer's arsenal. 📍

• Rezoning and GPR uplift have historically driven 15–25% price premiums in targeted zones
• Greater Southern Waterfront and Jurong Lake District lead the 2026 land-use watch list
• Policy headwinds — 60% ABSD, 55% TDSR and GLS supply — still frame the ceiling

The window between a masterplan signal and a priced-in market is 12–18 months. Most buyers miss it entirely.
